title.ko: 진동의 발생, 직접 또는 주파수 변조에 의한 진동의 발생, 스위칭 동작을 하지 않는 능동소자를 사용한 회로에 의한 진동의 발생; 이와 같은 회로에 의한 잡음의 발생 (전기 발성 악기에 특히 적합한 발생기 G10H; 메이저(maser), 레이저(Laser) H01S; 플라즈마에서 진동의 발생 H05H)
title.en: GENERATION OF OSCILLATIONS, DIRECTLY OR BY FREQUENCY-CHANGING, BY CIRCUITS EMPLOYING ACTIVE ELEMENTS WHICH OPERATE IN A NON-SWITCHING MANNER; GENERATION OF NOISE BY SUCH CIRCUITS (generators specially adapted for electrophonic musical instruments G10H;masers or lasers H01S; generation of oscillations in plasma H05H)

definition.ko: 주파수 변환에 의하지 않는 발생 증폭에 귀환에 의한 수단; 부성저항 H03B5/00; 7/00 주행시간형 전자관에 의한 수단; 전자 빔 관 H03B9/00; 13/00 충격진동에 의한 것; 홀(Hall) 효과; 방사원과 검출기의 조합 H03B11/00; 15/00; 17/00 주파수 변환에 의한 발생 신호의 체배 또는 체강(Division)에 의 한 것 H03B19/00 비변조 신호의 결합에 의한 것 H03B21/00 발생한 진동의 특수성 소인(swept-over)되는 주파수 범위; 다중 주파수; 다중 위상; 잡음 H03B23/00; 25/00; 27/00; 29/00 기타 방법 H03B28/00 세부 H03B1/00

title.ko: 세부
title.en: Details

title.ko: 전력발진기의 세부 구조, 예. 가열을 위한 것 (전자기장에 의한 가열을 위한 발생기 H05B 6/00)
title.en: Structural details of power oscillators, e.g. for heating (generators for heating by electromagnetic fields H05B0006000000)
Reducing undesired oscillations, e.g. harmonics

title.ko: 출력에서 입력에의 재생귀환에 의한 증폭기를 이용한 진동의 발생(H03B 9/00, H03B 15/00이 우선)
title.en: Generation of oscillations using amplifier with regenerative feedback from output to input (H03B0009000000, H03B0015000000 take precedence)

title.ko: 세부
title.en: Details
Modifications of generator to compensate for variations in physical values, e.g. power supply, load, temperature

title.ko: 발진의 기동을 확실히 하기 위한 발전기의 변형 (발전기의 기동 H03L 3/00)
title.en: Modifications of generator to ensure starting of oscillations (starting of generators H03L0003000000)

title.ko: 집중정수 인덕턴스와 집중정수 캐패시턴스로 이루어진 주파수 결정소자를 가지는 것
title.en: with frequency-determining element comprising lumped inductance and capacitance

title.ko: 증폭기의 능동소자가 진공관인 것(H03B 5/14가 우선)
title.en: active element in amplifier being vacuum tube (H03B0005140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 증폭기의 능동소자가 반도체장치인 것(H03B 5/14, H03B 7/06이 우선)
title.en: active element in amplifier being semiconductor device (H03B0005140000, H03B0007060000 take precedence)
the frequency-determining element being connected via a bridge circuit to a closed loop in which the signal is transmitted
active element in amplifier being vacuum tube
with frequency-determining element comprising distributed inductance and capacitance

title.ko: 주파수결정소자가 저항과 캐패시턴스 또는 인덕턴스 중 어느 하나로서 되는 것, 예. 위상 발진기
title.en: with frequency-determining element comprising resistance and either capacitance or inductance, e.g. phase-shift oscillator

title.ko: 증폭기의 능동소자가 진공관인 것(H03B 5/26이 우선)
title.en: active element in amplifier being vacuum tube (H03B0005260000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 증폭기의 능동소자가 반도체장치인 것(H03B 5/26이 우선)
title.en: active element in amplifier being semiconductor device (H03B0005260000 takes precedence)

the frequency-determining element being part of a bridge circuit in a closed loop in which the signal is transmitted; the frequency-determining element being connected via a bridge circuit to such a closed loop, e.g. Wien-Bridge oscillator, parallel-T oscillator
active element in amplifier being vacuum tube

title.ko: 주파수 결정소자가 전기기계적인 진동자인 것
title.en: with frequency-determining element being electromechanical resonator

title.ko: 압전기 진동자인 것
title.en: being a piezoelectric resonator

title.ko: 증폭기의 능동소자가 진공관인 것(H03B 5/38이 우선)
title.en: active element in amplifier being vacuum tube (H03B0005380000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 증폭기의 능동소자가 반도체장치인 것(H03B 5/38이 우선)
title.en: active element in amplifier being semiconductor device (H03B0005380000 takes precedence)
the frequency-determining element being connected via a bridge circuit to a closed loop in which the signal is transmitted

title.ko: 자왜진동자인 것 (H03B 5/42가 우선)
title.en: being a magnetostrictive resonator (H03B0005420000 takes precedence)
the frequency-determining element being connected via a bridge circuit to a closed loop in which the signal is transmitted

title.ko: 2개의 전극간의 부성저항이 있는 능동소자를 이용한 진동의 발생(H03B 9/00이 우선)
title.en: Generation of oscillations using active element having a negative resistance between two of its electrodes (H03B0009000000 takes precedence)
with frequency-determining element comprising lumped inductance and capacitance
active element being vacuum tube
active element being semiconductor device
being a tunnel diode
active element being gas-discharge or arc-discharge tube
with frequency-determining element comprising distributed inductance and capacitance
active element being semiconductor device

title.ko: 주행시간효과를 이용한 진동의 발생
title.en: Generation of oscillations using transit-time effects

title.ko: 전력관을 이용하는 것
title.en: using discharge tubes

title.ko: 지연전자계 전자관을 이용하는 것 (속도변조관(klystron) 을 이용하는 것 H03B 9/04)
title.en: using a retarding-field tube (using klystrons H03B0009040000)
using a klystron
using a reflex klystron
using a travelling-wave tube
using a magnetron
using solid state devices, e.g. Gunn-effect devices
and elements comprising distributed inductance and capacitance

title.ko: 충동려진 동조회로를 이용한 진동자의 발생(귀환이 있는 것 H03B 5/00)
title.en: Generation of oscillations using a shock-excited tuned circuit (with feedback H03B0005000000)
excited by spark
excited by interrupter
by mechanical interrupter
interrupter being discharge tube
interrupter being semiconductor device
Generation of oscillations using deflection of electron beam in a cathode-ray tube
Generation of oscillations using galvano-magnetic devices, e.g. Hall-effect devices, devices using spin transfer effects, devices using giant magnetoresistance, or using super-conductivity effects
Generation of oscillations using a radiation source and a detector
Generation of oscillations by non-regenerative frequency multiplication or division of a signal from a separate source
using non-linear inductance
using non-linear capacitance, e.g. varactor diodes
by means of discharge device or semiconductor device with more than two electrodes
by means of a discharge device
using multiplication only
using division only
by means of a semiconductor device
using uncontrolled rectifying devices, e.g. rectifying diodes or Schottky diodes
and elements comprising distributed inductance and capacitance
being diodes exhibiting charge storage or enhancement effects

title.ko: 상이한 주파수의 비변조 신호를 결합하는 것에 의한 진동의 발생 (H03B 19/00이 우선)
title.en: Generation of oscillations by combining unmodulated signals of different frequencies (H03B0019000000 takes precedence)
by beating unmodulated signals of different frequencies
by plural beating, i.e. for frequency synthesis
using several similar stages
Generation of oscillations periodically swept over a predetermined frequency range
Simultaneous generation by a free-running oscillator of oscillations having different frequencies
Generation of oscillations providing a plurality of outputs of the same frequency but differing in phase, other than merely two anti-phase outputs

title.ko: 그룹 H03B5/00 ~ H03B27/00에 포함되지 않는 방법에 의한 진동의 발생, 정현파 진동을 생성하기 위한 파형의 수정을 포함하는 것 (계산 동작을 수행하기 위한 아날로그 함수 발생기 G06G7/26)
title.en: Generation of oscillations by methods not covered by groups H03B0005000000-H03B0027000000, including modification of the waveform to produce sinusoidal oscillations (analogue function generators for performing computing operations G06G0007260000)

title.ko: 잡음전류 및 잡음전압의 발생 (잡음 발생기로 특히 적합한 고체 음극(cathodes)이 있는 가스입 방전관 H01J 17/00)
title.en: Generation of noise currents and voltages (gas-filled discharge tubes with solid cathode specially adapted as noise generators H01J0017000000)
